```{r}
# Nature Journal Style Transcript Analysis Plots
# Author: Rebecca L
# Date: 2025-06-02
# SKMM2 cDNA dRNA Transcript Comparison

# Load required libraries
library(ggvenn)
library(dplyr)
library(edgeR)
library(stats)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(ggpubr)
library(biomaRt)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scales)

# ==========================================
# SETUP: Colors, Fonts, and Theme
# ==========================================

# Check available fonts and use appropriate one
available_fonts <- c("Helvetica", "Arial", "sans")
font_to_use <- available_fonts[available_fonts %in% names(pdfFonts())][1]
if(is.na(font_to_use)) font_to_use <- "sans"

# Define Nature journal color palette
nature_colors <- c("#E64B35", "#4DBBD5", "#00A087", "#3C5488", "#F39B7F", "#8491B4")
protocol_colors <- c("PCR-cDNA" = "#4DBBD5", "direct RNA" = "#E64B35")
confidence_colors <- c("High" = "#8B0000", "Medium" = "#DC143C", "Low" = "#FFB6C1")
length_colors <- c("<1000bp" = "#E64B35", "1000-3500bp" = "#4DBBD5", ">3500bp" = "#00A087")

# Custom Nature-style theme
nature_theme <- function() {
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    # Text elements
    text = element_text(family = font_to_use, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 7, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7, color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 9, color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    
    # Lines and borders
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.5),
    
    # Background
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 0.3),
    
    # Legend
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.position = "right",
    
    # Margins
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5, unit = "pt")
  )
}

# ==========================================
# DATA IMPORT AND PROCESSING
# ==========================================

# Read in matrices - All reads
cdna_tx <- read.table("./bambu_counts/cdna2_SKMM2_counts_transcript.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
drna_tx <- read.table("./bambu_counts/drnasub_SKMM2_counts_transcript.txt", header = T)

# Full-length reads
cdna_fl <- read.table("./bambu_counts/cdna2_SKMM2_fullLengthCounts_transcript.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
drna_fl <- read.table("./bambu_counts/drnasub_SKMM2_fullLengthCounts_transcript.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")

# Unique Reads
cdna_uni <- read.table("./bambu_counts/cdna2_SKMM2_uniqueCounts_transcript.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
drna_uni <- read.table("./bambu_counts/drnasub_SKMM2_uniqueCounts_transcript.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")

# Filter out transcripts not detected at any level
cdna_tx2 <- cdna_tx[rowSums(cdna_tx[3:8]) > 0,]
drna_tx2 <- drna_tx[rowSums(drna_tx[3:8]) > 0,]

# Subset full-length and unique counts to these filtered tx
cdna_uni2 <- cdna_uni[cdna_uni$TXNAME %in% cdna_tx2$TXNAME,]
drna_uni2 <- drna_uni[drna_uni$TXNAME %in% drna_tx2$TXNAME,]
cdna_fl2 <- cdna_fl[cdna_fl$TXNAME %in% cdna_tx2$TXNAME,]
drna_fl2 <- drna_fl[drna_fl$TXNAME %in% drna_tx2$TXNAME,]

# Combine into list
cdna <- list("all" = cdna_tx2, "full_length" = cdna_fl2, "unique" = cdna_uni2)
drna <- list("all" = drna_tx2, "full_length" = drna_fl2, "unique" = drna_uni2)
rm(cdna_tx, drna_tx, cdna_fl, drna_fl, cdna_uni, drna_uni)

# Convert total counts to CPM
cdna$cpm <- data.frame(cdna$all[,1:2], cpm(cdna$all[3:8], log = FALSE))
drna$cpm <- data.frame(drna$all[,1:2], cpm(drna$all[3:8], log = FALSE))

# Summary columns on each df
cdna <- lapply(cdna, function(x){ 
  x$sum <- rowSums(x[3:8]) 
  x$detect <- rowSums((x[3:8]) > 0) 
  x$mean <- rowMeans(x[3:8]) 
  return(x)
})           

drna <- lapply(drna, function(x){ 
  x$sum <- rowSums(x[3:8]) 
  x$detect <- rowSums((x[3:8]) > 0) 
  x$mean <- rowMeans(x[3:8]) 
  return(x)
})           

# ==========================================
# CONFIDENCE LEVELS CALCULATION
# ==========================================

# High confidence
cdna_high <- Reduce(intersect, list(cdna$unique$TXNAME[cdna$unique$sum > 5], 
                                   cdna$full_length$TXNAME[cdna$full_length$sum > 5]))
drna_high <- Reduce(intersect, list(drna$unique$TXNAME[drna$unique$sum > 5], 
                                   drna$full_length$TXNAME[drna$full_length$sum > 5]))

# Low confidence
cdna_low <- Reduce(intersect, list(cdna$full_length$TXNAME[cdna$full_length$sum == 0],
                                  cdna$unique$TXNAME[cdna$unique$sum == 0]))
drna_low <- Reduce(intersect, list(drna$full_length$TXNAME[drna$full_length$sum == 0],
                                  drna$unique$TXNAME[drna$unique$sum == 0]))

# Medium
cdna_med <- cdna$all$TXNAME[!cdna$all$TXNAME %in% cdna_high & !cdna$all$TXNAME %in% cdna_low]
drna_med <- drna$all$TXNAME[!drna$all$TXNAME %in% drna_high & !drna$all$TXNAME %in% drna_low]

# List
cdna_conf <- list("Low" = cdna_low, "Medium" = cdna_med, "High" = cdna_high)
drna_conf <- list("Low" = drna_low, "Medium" = drna_med, "High" = drna_high)
rm(cdna_low, cdna_med, cdna_high, drna_low, drna_med, drna_high)

# ==========================================
# FIGURE 1: Transcript Detection Confidence
# ==========================================

# Annotate confidence levels
cdna$cpm$confidence <- "Low"
cdna$cpm$confidence[cdna$cpm$TXNAME %in% cdna_conf$Medium] <- "Medium"
cdna$cpm$confidence[cdna$cpm$TXNAME %in% cdna_conf$High] <- "High"

drna$cpm$confidence <- "Low"
drna$cpm$confidence[drna$cpm$TXNAME %in% drna_conf$Medium] <- "Medium"
drna$cpm$confidence[drna$cpm$TXNAME %in% drna_conf$High] <- "High"

# Create stacked data
stacked <- data.frame(cdna = table(cdna$cpm$confidence), drna = table(drna$cpm$confidence))[,-3]
stacked_m <- pivot_longer(stacked, cols = 2:3)
colnames(stacked_m) <- c("conf", "protocol", "Number_of_Transcripts")
stacked_m <- stacked_m %>% 
  mutate(Protocol = as.factor(case_when(protocol == "cdna.Freq" ~ "PCR-cDNA", 
                                       .default = "direct RNA")))

# Create publication-quality stacked bar plot
fig1 <- stacked_m %>% 
  mutate(Confidence = fct_relevel(conf, "High", "Medium", "Low")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Protocol, y = Number_of_Transcripts, fill = Confidence)) +
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.3, width = 0.7) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = confidence_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), labels = comma_format()) +
  labs(x = "Protocol", 
       y = "Number of transcripts", 
       fill = "Confidence") +
  nature_theme() +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.85, 0.85),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 0.3),
        legend.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 4, b = 2, l = 4, unit = "pt"))

print(fig1)

# Print summary statistics
cat("Transcript Detection Summary:\n")
cat("============================\n")
for(protocol in c("PCR-cDNA", "direct RNA")) {
  data_subset <- stacked_m[stacked_m$Protocol == protocol,]
  total <- sum(data_subset$Number_of_Transcripts)
  cat(sprintf("%s: %d total transcripts\n", protocol, total))
  for(conf in c("High", "Medium", "Low")) {
    count <- data_subset$Number_of_Transcripts[data_subset$conf == conf]
    if(length(count) > 0) {
      pct <- round(100 * count / total, 1)
      cat(sprintf("  %s: %d (%s%%)\n", conf, count, pct))
    }
  }
}

# ==========================================
# FIGURE 2: Confidence by Transcript Length
# ==========================================

# Load transcript annotation
tx_annot <- read.csv(file = "tx_info.csv", header = TRUE)
cdna$cpmannot <- left_join(cdna$cpm, tx_annot, by = "TXNAME")
drna$cpmannot <- left_join(drna$cpm, tx_annot, by = "TXNAME")

# Add quartile information
cdna$cpmannot <- cdna$cpmannot %>% 
  mutate(quartile = as.factor(case_when(Length > 999 & Length < 3500 ~ "1000-3500bp", 
                                       Length > 3500 ~ ">3500bp", 
                                       .default = "<1000bp")))

drna$cpmannot <- drna$cpmannot %>% 
  mutate(quartile = as.factor(case_when(Length > 999 & Length < 3500 ~ "1000-3500bp", 
                                       Length > 3500 ~ ">3500bp", 
                                       .default = "<1000bp")))

# Create confidence by length data
conf_length <- data.frame(cdna = table(cdna$cpmannot$confidence, cdna$cpmannot$quartile), 
                         drna = table(drna$cpmannot$confidence, drna$cpmannot$quartile))[,-c(4:5)]
stacked_length <- pivot_longer(conf_length, cols = 3:4)
colnames(stacked_length) <- c("conf", "Quartile", "Protocol", "Number_of_Transcripts")
stacked_length$Protocol[stacked_length$Protocol == "cdna.Freq"] <- "PCR-cDNA"
stacked_length$Protocol[stacked_length$Protocol == "drna.Freq"] <- "direct RNA"

# Figure 2A: Confidence by length (stacked by confidence)
fig2a <- stacked_length %>% 
  mutate(Confidence = fct_relevel(conf, "High", "Medium", "Low"), 
         Length_Category = fct_relevel(Quartile, "<1000bp", "1000-3500bp", ">3500bp")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Protocol, y = Number_of_Transcripts, fill = Confidence)) +
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.2, width = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~Length_Category, scales = "free_y") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = confidence_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), labels = comma_format()) +
  labs(x = "Protocol", 
       y = "Number of transcripts", 
       fill = "Confidence") +
  nature_theme() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 7))

print(fig2a)

# Figure 2B: Length distribution by confidence (stacked by length)
fig2b <- stacked_length %>% 
  mutate(Confidence = fct_relevel(conf, "High", "Medium", "Low"),
         Length_Category = fct_relevel(Quartile, "<1000bp", "1000-3500bp", ">3500bp")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Protocol, y = Number_of_Transcripts, fill = Length_Category)) +
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.2, width = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~Confidence, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = length_colors, name = "Length") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), labels = comma_format()) +
  labs(x = "Protocol", 
       y = "Number of transcripts", 
       fill = "Length") +
  nature_theme() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 7))

print(fig2b)

# ==========================================
# FIGURE 3: Venn Diagrams (Improved)
# ==========================================

# Create custom Venn diagram function for better control
create_nature_venn <- function(data_list, title, colors) {
  ggvenn(data = data_list,
         fill_color = colors,
         auto_scale = TRUE, 
         show_percentage = FALSE,
         set_name_size = 3,
         text_size = 3) +
    labs(title = title) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0.5, family = font_to_use),
          plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5, unit = "pt"))
}

# Get overlap statistics for reporting
overlap <- gplots::venn(data = list("dRNA" = drna$all$TXNAME, "cDNA" = cdna$all$TXNAME), 
                       show.plot = FALSE, intersections = TRUE)
lists <- attr(overlap, "intersections")
shared_tx <- lists$`dRNA:cDNA`

# Create Venn diagrams
venn_colors <- c("#4DBBD5", "#E64B35")  # cDNA blue, dRNA red

fig3a <- create_nature_venn(list("cDNA" = cdna$all$TXNAME, "dRNA" = drna$all$TXNAME),
                           "All transcripts", venn_colors)

fig3b <- create_nature_venn(list("cDNA" = cdna_conf$High, "dRNA" = drna_conf$High),
                           "High confidence", venn_colors)

fig3c <- create_nature_venn(list("cDNA" = cdna_conf$Medium, "dRNA" = drna_conf$Medium),
                           "Medium confidence", venn_colors)

fig3d <- create_nature_venn(list("cDNA" = cdna_conf$Low, "dRNA" = drna_conf$Low),
                           "Low confidence", venn_colors)

# Combine Venn diagrams
fig3_combined <- ggarrange(fig3a, fig3b, fig3c, fig3d,
                          ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
                          labels = c("a", "b", "c", "d"),
                          font.label = list(size = 9, face = "bold"))

print(fig3_combined)

# Print overlap statistics
cat("\nTranscript Overlap Analysis:\n")
cat("============================\n")
cat("Total unique transcripts:\n")
cat(sprintf("  cDNA only: %d\n", length(setdiff(cdna$all$TXNAME, drna$all$TXNAME))))
cat(sprintf("  dRNA only: %d\n", length(setdiff(drna$all$TXNAME, cdna$all$TXNAME))))
cat(sprintf("  Shared: %d\n", length(shared_tx)))

# ==========================================
# FIGURE 4: Length Distribution Analysis
# ==========================================

# Create combined length distribution plot
length_summary <- bind_rows(
  cdna$cpmannot %>% dplyr::select(TXNAME, Length, confidence) %>% mutate(Protocol = "PCR-cDNA"),
  drna$cpmannot %>% dplyr::select(TXNAME, Length, confidence) %>% mutate(Protocol = "direct RNA")
) %>% filter(!is.na(Length))

fig4 <- length_summary %>%
  mutate(Confidence = fct_relevel(confidence, "High", "Medium", "Low")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = log10(Length), fill = Protocol)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~Confidence, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = protocol_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(2, 3, 4, 5), 
                     labels = c("100", "1K", "10K", "100K")) +
  labs(x = "Transcript length (bp)",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Protocol") +
  nature_theme()

print(fig4)

# ==========================================
# Save all plots for publication
# ==========================================

# Method 1: Save with Cairo for better font handling
if(require("Cairo", quietly = TRUE)) {
  # Save individual figures
  ggsave("Figure1_TranscriptConfidence.pdf", fig1, width = 85, height = 60, units = "mm", 
         dpi = 300, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave("Figure2A_ConfidenceByLength.pdf", fig2a, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", 
         dpi = 300, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave("Figure2B_LengthByConfidence.pdf", fig2b, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", 
         dpi = 300, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave("Figure3_VennDiagrams.pdf", fig3_combined, width = 130, height = 100, units = "mm", 
         dpi = 300, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave("Figure4_LengthDistribution.pdf", fig4, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", 
         dpi = 300, device = cairo_pdf)
  
  # Save as PNG alternatives
  ggsave("Figure1_TranscriptConfidence.png", fig1, width = 85, height = 60, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure2A_ConfidenceByLength.png", fig2a, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure2B_LengthByConfidence.png", fig2b, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure3_VennDiagrams.png", fig3_combined, width = 130, height = 100, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure4_LengthDistribution.png", fig4, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  
  cat("All plots saved successfully with Cairo!\n")
} else {
  # Fallback method: Use PNG format
  ggsave("Figure1_TranscriptConfidence.png", fig1, width = 85, height = 60, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure2A_ConfidenceByLength.png", fig2a, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure2B_LengthByConfidence.png", fig2b, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure3_VennDiagrams.png", fig3_combined, width = 130, height = 100, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Figure4_LengthDistribution.png", fig4, width = 130, height = 80, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
  
  cat("Plots saved as PNG format (install Cairo package for PDF support)\n")
  cat("To install Cairo: install.packages('Cairo')\n")
}

# Alternative PDF saving method
tryCatch({
  pdf("TranscriptAnalysis_AllFigures.pdf", width = 170/25.4, height = 200/25.4)
  print(fig1)
  print(fig2a)
  print(fig2b)
  print(fig3_combined)
  print(fig4)
  dev.off()
  
  cat("Combined PDF file also saved!\n")
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("Combined PDF saving failed:", e$message, "\n")
})

cat("\n==========================================\n")
cat("TRANSCRIPT ANALYSIS FIGURES GENERATED\n")
cat("==========================================\n")
cat("Figure 1: Overall transcript confidence\n")
cat("Figure 2A: Confidence by transcript length\n") 
cat("Figure 2B: Length distribution by confidence\n")
cat("Figure 3: Venn diagrams (4 panels)\n")
cat("Figure 4: Length distribution density plots\n")
cat("==========================================\n")

```
